Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that are part of cases eventually reaching 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' compared to the frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Accepted + In Progress' for cases where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' that occur more than once in the same case
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Ratio of 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + Resolved' across all cases
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Accepted + In Progress' for cases where activity 'Completed + Resolved' occurs

Name: Number of variants in which 'Accepted + In Progress' appears at least twice before any waiting state (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User')
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` != 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that are not followed by any waiting activity (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - Customer', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', etc.)
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all cases where 'Accepted + Wait - Customer' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' in cases that include 'Completed + In Call' versus cases that do not
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Accepted + In Progress' for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of total 'Completed + In Call' events that are immediately preceded by 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average number of 'Accepted + In Progress' occurrences per case that ends with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that lead directly to closure-type outcomes (e.g., 'Completed + Closed') without intermediate queuing or waiting
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Number of times 'Accepted + In Progress' is repeated consecutively before transitioning to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of variants starting with 'Accepted + In Progress' that result in 'Completed + In Call' as a terminal or intermediate activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + In Call' within the same case
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Accepted + In Progress' for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities occurring in the first 24 hours of a case that later includes 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of distinct resources performing 'Accepted + In Progress' in cases that also contain 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities grouped by the last value of org:resource filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' relative to the total number of events in high-impact (High/Medium) cases involving 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Accepted + In Progress'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': 'impact == High'}"
